headline: ₹100-400 Cr at risk over 3-5 years if ESG-driven capital outflows or valuation compression materialize. at stake — Adani Power's Rajasthan coal plant prioritization signals increased fossil fuel dependency, risking ESG ratings and capital costs
what_matters: Risk of P/E compression (5-10%) if FII outflows accelerate on weak ESG signals; margin erosion possible if green premium lost.
Possible 20-40bps increase in cost of capital due to negative ESG perception and BRSR/TCFD scrutiny.
BRSR [MANDATORY], GRI, CDP, TCFD triggered; risk of SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions if disclosures lag.
